cfo_decision_summary.financial_position: AI token spend at NovaTech delivers strong ROI but requires targeted optimization to mitigate overspend and quality risks.
finance_controls_to_apply: Set monthly token budget thresholds by team and user segment.
Require review for high-spend users below ROI threshold.
Preserve access for high-ROI users and replicate their workflows.
Downgrade or pause premium usage where ROI remains low after remediation.

summary: NovaTech's AI token spend is 81.7% of the annual budget with a 26.9% increase vs. last 12-month average, representing 2.88% of annual revenue.
Productivity improved by 29.7% and bug rates reduced by 26.5% post-AI adoption, confirming value creation.
Top 10% users deliver 5.76x higher spend efficiency than bottom 10%, highlighting uneven ROI distribution.
Seven overspenders consume disproportionate tokens with low ROI and quality scores, posing budget and quality risks.
One user flagged for quality risk requires immediate review to prevent defect-related costs.
Conservative forecast assumes AI spend growth will moderate to 10% next quarter with continued productivity gains of 5% from optimization.

diagnosis.message: Overspenders Yanis Mercier, Ibrahim Haddad, Julie Laurent, Tom Bernard, Nathan Colin, Kevin Moreau, and Omar Benali drive budget risk with low ROI and quality scores.
Quality risk identified with Maxime Dubois, whose low quality score may increase defect-related costs.
Low adoption among 5 employees limits potential productivity gains and indicates opportunity for targeted enablement.

recommended_action_plan.title: Implement Spend Caps for Overspenders
recommended_action_plan.action: Set and monitor monthly AI token usage limits for top 7 overspenders to control budget risk.
recommended_action_plan.expected_effect: Reduce AI spend waste by 20%, saving approximately $4,900 monthly.

recommended_action_plan.title: Quality Risk Mitigation for Maxime Dubois
recommended_action_plan.action: Perform detailed quality review and provide targeted coaching to improve output quality.
recommended_action_plan.expected_effect: Achieve 15% reduction in bugs related to this user, lowering defect costs.

recommended_action_plan.title: Increase AI Adoption in Low Usage Employees
recommended_action_plan.action: Launch training programs and incentives to boost AI token utilization among low adoption employees.
recommended_action_plan.expected_effect: Drive 10% productivity lift in this segment, increasing overall efficiency.

recommended_action_plan.title: Scale High ROI User Best Practices
recommended_action_plan.action: Document and disseminate effective AI usage patterns from top performers to all teams.
recommended_action_plan.expected_effect: Improve company-wide productivity by 5%, enhancing ROI on AI spend.

roi_score.estimate: business_output_generated / token_spend, blended with quality and productivity scores

assumptions.name: AI Spend Growth Next Quarter
assumptions.rationale: Conservative moderation from current 15.6% MoM growth due to spend controls.

assumptions.name: Productivity Gain from Optimization
assumptions.rationale: Based on achievable lift from scaling best practices and training low adoption users.

assumptions.name: Bug Reduction from Quality Controls
assumptions.rationale: Expected defect reduction from targeted coaching of quality risk user.

assumptions.name: baseline_monthly_revenue_growth
assumptions.rationale: Conservative default for do-nothing revenue projection.

assumptions.name: baseline_monthly_ai_spend_growth
assumptions.rationale: Derived from current spend versus previous 12-month average.

assumptions.name: action_plan_productivity_lift
assumptions.rationale: Capped aggregate lift from action plan items.

assumptions.name: action_plan_ai_spend_reduction
assumptions.rationale: Capped aggregate spend reduction from action plan items.

assumptions.name: action_plan_bug_reduction
assumptions.rationale: Capped aggregate quality improvement from action plan items.
